quote: If you try to micromanage yourself all you're going to do is make yourself miserable. – Naval Ravikant
fact: Hershey`s Kisses are called that because the machine that makes them looks like it`s kissing the conveyor belt.
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke: What do you call a pig that knows karate? A pork chop!
